title: digitaria timorensis
intro: Digitaria timorensis is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to the tropical regions of Timor Island in Indonesia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its antipyretic and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Digitaria timorensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and asthma, and act as an antioxidant to protect against oxidative stress. Digitaria timorensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
